docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMORE REAL ESTATE INC CONLEY, OWEN D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAVENDER, DERRICK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1350 GOLD GATE AVE. #20, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DERRICK LAVENDER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. THE DEFENDANT PROVIDED THE COURT WITH A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE INDICATING THAT PLAINTIFF WAS TIMELY SERVED WITH THIS MOTION AND ALSO A STIPULATION SIGNED BY ALL OF THE PARTIES.
